testcase.name: Full System Integrity
testcase.system-out:
🏁 STARTING END-TO-END SYSTEM TEST... 1️⃣ Creating test post... ✅ Create Successful 2️⃣ Testing view tracking (RPC)... ✅ View Increment Successful 3️⃣ Verifying data integrity... ✅ Data Integrity Verified 4️⃣ Cleaning up database... ✅ Cleanup Successful
🎊 ALL SYSTEMS PASS. VERSION 3.5 PRO IS STABLE.

testcase.name: Admin Health & Schema
testcase.system-out:
👮 STARTING ADMIN SYSTEM VERIFICATION... ✅ Global State Entity Found ✅ CMS Table 'site_content' Verified ✅ Broadcasts Schema Verified (Tags & Views columns exist) ✅ Admin File Integrity Verified
🔐 ADMIN SYSTEM SAFE & READY.

testcase.name: User Flow Validation
testcase.system-out:
🏁 STARTING FULL USER-FLOW VALIDATION...
📩 Testing Contact Form Submission... ✅ SUCCESS: Contact data reached Supabase.
📊 Validating Dashboard Metrics... ✅ SUCCESS: Dashboard Aggregation Logic verified. Total Broadcast Views: 0
🛠️ Validating Admin CRUD (Broadcasts)... ✅ SUCCESS: Admin CRUD lifecycle is 100% operational.
📡 Checking Real-time Sync Readiness... ✅ SUCCESS: Supabase Real-time connection established.
🎊 FULL SITE VALIDATION COMPLETE. ALL SYSTEMS OPTIMAL.

testcase.name: Authentication Logic
testcase.system-out:
🧪 STARTING AUTH FLOW UNIT TESTS... Test 1: Logout Behavior... ✅ PASSED Test 2: Valid Token Check... ✅ PASSED Test 3: Expired Token Check... ✅ PASSED Test 4: Bypass Token Check... ✅ PASSED
🎉 ALL AUTH TESTS PASSED.

testcase.name: Post Management Logic
testcase.system-out: TEST: Create Post [MOCK] Insert into posts: [ { title: 'Test Title', content: 'Test Content', slug: 'test-title', tags: [ 'tag1', 'tag2' ], image_url: '', published: true, updated_at: '2026-03-13T14:18:00.471Z' } ] [MOCK] Reset Form [MOCK] Fetch Posts ✅ Create Post Passed TEST: Update Post [MOCK] Update posts where id=123: { title: 'Updated Title', content: 'Test Content', slug: 'updated-title', tags: [ 'tag1', 'tag2' ], image_url: '', published: true, updated_at: '2026-03-13T14:18:00.473Z' } [MOCK] Reset Form [MOCK] Fetch Posts ✅ Update Post Passed ALL TESTS PASSED

testcase.name: Email Link Logic
testcase.system-out: TEST: Email Link Formatting Generated Link: mailto:test@example.com?subject=Inquiry Reply: Only True Perspective // John Doe&body=Hello there! ✅ Email Link Formatting Passed

testcase.name: Theme Logic
testcase.system-out: Running Theme Toggle Tests... PASS: Initial theme is dark (no attribute) PASS: Toggled to light mode PASS: LocalStorage updated to 'light' PASS: Toggled back to dark mode PASS: LocalStorage updated to 'dark' PASS: Local user preference overrides remote state Theme tests complete.

testcase.name: Menu Logic
testcase.system-out: Running Menu Logic Tests... PASS: Drawer has 'open' class after click. PASS: aria-expanded is 'true' (string). PASS: Drawer removed 'open' class after second click. PASS: aria-expanded is 'false' (string).
